chapters.title: BMC Training & Awareness — sample chapter
chapters.summary: A sample chapter so the page has something to show. It is replaced automatically the first time the Drive sync runs.

sections.name: Info
sections.body_html:
This text comes from the Word document inside the chapter folder. Its heading is the file's name — name the file Info and this section is called “Info”; name it Description and it becomes “Description”.

Because the file was named 1 Info.docx, it appears first, before the folders numbered 2, 3, 4, 5 below. The location “Piperchhedi” was read from the chapter folder name “Chapter 14 : Piperchhedi”.
